articles.title_en: The Central Bank bought 9.3 billion rubles worth of yuan with settlements on July 6
articles.lead_en: The Bank of Russia conducts purchase and sale operations of foreign currency on the domestic market in the currency section of the Moscow Exchange in the instrument "yuan - ruble"

articles.title_en: In Russia, seven gas turbines for the energy sector will be produced in 2026
articles.lead_en: In the Russian Federation, 19 types of gas turbine engines are produced in the range from 2 to 170 MW, recalled Deputy Minister of Industry and Trade Mikhail Ivanov

articles.lead_raw: В РФ выпускается 19 видов газотурбинных двигателей в диапазоне от 2 до 170 МВт, напомнил замминистра промышленности и торговли Михаил Иванов
